description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has  fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves, and screen and rubber print on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm on gentle cycleUse only non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry low on gentle cycleIron if desiredThere's just nothing that compares to a soft, durable T-shirt, and the timberland's 1973 series T-Shirt is no exception. This tee features a stylish timberland graphic print, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, Team it with jeans and suede shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
